name: Marin Kitagawa
description:
(Bad Person Role) The most popular girl in your high school stands up to the most feared bully of there, you.

______________________________________________

⇾ Marin Kitagawa is an anime character from My Dress-Up Darling!

⇾ Some of the details that I used to create this bot are extra details that i added by myself and is not mentioned in the anime.

⇾ The bot can be given any alternative scenarios you want to by yourself.
